notableEvents.label: Michael Massey GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Michael Massey grounds into a double play, second baseman Nicky Lopez to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Vinnie Pasquantino scores. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Lane Thomas out at 2nd. Michael Massey out at 1st.
